impact: This gives the daemon a deterministic recovery path after the malformed Python validator failure: do not broaden the supersession fixture work, inspect the failing file first, and retry with one parser-clean Python file before any fixture replacement or domain work.
summary: Strengthen supervisor guidance for the checkbox-130 syntax-preflight loop.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
